title: cleome lanceolata subsp. oaxacensis
intro: Cleome lanceolata subsp. oaxacensis, also known as a variety of the Spider Flower, is a flowering plant native to Mexico and Central America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, and is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Cleome lanceolata subsp. oaxacensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often combined with other herbs in traditional remedies.
